mapper.select: SELECT b.busi_id, d.dtd_code, b.doc_id, b.doc_code , b.doc_name, a.dtd_attr_id, a.attr_code, a.attr_name, a.regex, d.dtd_type_id, d.dtd_name FROM ecm_busi_doc b LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel AS r ON b.doc_code = r.doc_code LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_def AS d ON r.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_attr AS a ON a.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id WHERE b.busi_id = #{busiId} AND d.dtd_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.attr_sort ASC

SELECT b.app_code, b.doc_code, d.dtd_code, a.dtd_attr_id, a.attr_code, a.attr_name, a.regex, d.dtd_type_id, d.dtd_name FROM ecm_app_doc_rel b LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel r ON b.doc_code = r.doc_code LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_def d ON r.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_attr a ON a.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id WHERE b.app_code = #{appCode} AND d.dtd_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.attr_sort ASC

SELECT b.busi_id, d.dtd_code, b.doc_id, b.doc_code , b.doc_name, a.dtd_attr_id, a.attr_code, a.attr_name, a.regex, d.dtd_type_id, d.dtd_name FROM ecm_busi_doc b LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel r on b.doc_code = r.doc_code LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_def d on r.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_attr a on a.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id WHERE b.busi_id = #{busiId} AND d.dtd_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.attr_sort ASC

SELECT b.app_code, b.doc_code, d.dtd_code, a.dtd_attr_id, a.attr_code, a.attr_name, a.regex, d.dtd_type_id, d.dtd_name FROM ecm_app_doc_rel b LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_doc_rel r on b.doc_code = r.doc_code LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_def d on r.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id LEFT JOIN ecm_dtd_attr a on a.dtd_type_id = d.dtd_type_id WHERE b.app_code = #{appCode} AND d.dtd_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY a.attr_sort ASC
